landing.meta.title: OnboardIQ — Smart Employee Onboarding Platform for SMEs
landing.hero.badge: #1 Onboarding Platform for SMEs in Vietnam
landing.hero.subtitle: From automated checklists to 24/7 AI chatbot — OnboardIQ helps HR managers create a professional onboarding experience new employees will never forget.
landing.hero.cta_primary: Get started free — no credit card required
landing.hero.mock_chatbot_question: How do I book a meeting room?
landing.features.title: Everything you need for world-class onboarding
landing.features.subtitle: From day one to 60 days — OnboardIQ tracks and supports every new employee's journey.
landing.features.checklist.title: Automated checklists
landing.features.checklist.desc: Automatically assign onboarding tasks by department and role. No more manual emails from HR.
landing.features.chatbot.title: AI Chatbot 24/7
landing.features.chatbot.desc: New employees can ask anything at any time. AI is trained on your company's knowledge base.
landing.features.survey.title: 7-30-60 day surveys
landing.features.survey.desc: Automatic periodic surveys, sentiment analysis and early resignation risk alerts.
landing.features.roles.title: Role-based dashboards
landing.features.roles.desc: HR, Manager, Employee — everyone sees exactly what they need. No noise, no clutter.
landing.features.documents.title: Document management & acknowledgment
landing.features.documents.desc: Upload policies, contracts, training materials. Employees confirm and e-sign documents.
landing.features.automation.title: Process automation
landing.features.automation.desc: Set up triggers and rules: auto-send welcome emails, create accounts, assign mentors when employees join.
landing.how_it_works.subtitle: No technical training needed. No IT setup. Just 4 simple steps.
landing.how_it_works.step1.title: Create onboarding template
landing.how_it_works.step1.desc: HR builds checklists, documents and standard onboarding workflows for each role in minutes.
landing.how_it_works.step2.title: Add new employee
landing.how_it_works.step2.desc: Enter details or import from existing HR systems. System automatically assigns tasks and sends notifications.
landing.how_it_works.step3.title: Employee self-completes
landing.how_it_works.step3.desc: New employees log in, view tasks, read documents and ask the AI chatbot whenever they need help.
landing.how_it_works.step4.title: Track & improve
landing.how_it_works.step4.desc: Realtime dashboards, automated surveys and detailed reports help HR continuously improve the process.
landing.how_it_works.stat1.label: Saved per new hire
landing.how_it_works.stat2.label: Faster onboarding
landing.how_it_works.stat3.label: Task completion rate
landing.pricing.subtitle: Start free. Upgrade when you need. Cancel anytime.
landing.pricing.vat_note: All prices exclude VAT. Pay securely via VNPay, MoMo or bank transfer.
landing.pricing.plan_basic.name: Basic
landing.pricing.plan_basic.desc: Start digitizing onboarding at zero cost.
landing.pricing.plan_pro.name: Pro
landing.pricing.plan_pro.desc: For fast-growing SMEs that need professional onboarding.
landing.pricing.plan_business.name: Business
landing.pricing.plan_business.desc: For 100–500 employee companies needing HR system integrations.
landing.pricing.plan_enterprise.name: Enterprise
landing.pricing.plan_enterprise.desc: Custom solution for enterprises with specific security and compliance requirements.
landing.testimonials.title: What customers say about OnboardIQ
landing.testimonials.subtitle: Trusted by 200+ businesses across Vietnam.
landing.testimonials.t1.quote: OnboardIQ reduced HR onboarding time by 70%. New employees now feel more welcome and better prepared.
landing.testimonials.t2.quote: The AI Chatbot is truly impressive. New employees ask all kinds of questions and always get accurate answers aligned with company policy.
landing.testimonials.t3.quote: Since using the 30-60 day surveys, we detect and resolve issues before employees consider leaving. Retention rate increased by 40%.
landing.faq.title: Frequently asked questions
landing.faq.subtitle: Can't find your answer? Reach out to our support team.
landing.faq.q1: Does OnboardIQ integrate with our existing HR software?
landing.faq.a1: Yes. OnboardIQ supports API/Webhook integration with popular systems like Base HR, MISA, SlimCRM, BambooHR and more. Business plan and above includes full API docs and sandbox.
landing.faq.a2: Data is encrypted with AES-256 at-rest and TLS 1.3 in-transit. The system meets SOC 2 Type II standards and complies with PDPA. Enterprise plan supports on-premise deployment.
landing.faq.q3: How long does it take to set up?
landing.faq.a3: On average 30 minutes to finish setup and onboard the first employee. We have a step-by-step wizard and a library of ready-made templates for popular industries.
landing.faq.a4: Absolutely. The Basic plan is free forever for 5 employees. Pro and Business plans have a 14-day free trial, no credit card required.
landing.faq.q5: If my company grows and needs to upgrade, is it easy?
landing.faq.a5: Very easy. You can upgrade at any time directly in the app. All current data and settings are fully preserved.

landing.cta.subtitle: Join 200+ businesses using OnboardIQ to build outstanding onboarding experiences.
landing.cta.trust: No credit card · Setup in 30 min · Cancel anytime
